title: The Copycat
premise: Your startup's flagship product has been cloned feature-for-feature by MegaCorp, which has 20 times your funding. Your board demands a survival plan by Friday, or they'll replace you as CEO.
setting: A trendy co-working space in San Francisco, 2024. Your 20-person startup is crammed into two rooms, with whiteboards covered in pivot ideas. The clock is ticking: three days until the board meeting.
goal: Deliver a convincing survival plan to the board by Friday that either differentiates the product, secures a strategic partnership, or pivots to a defensible market. Success: the board approves your plan. Failure: you're ousted, and the company folds.
gm_notes: Introduce time pressure, conflicting advice from team members, and a leak that MegaCorp might be interested in acquiring you. Secretly, one of the roles may be a mole. The plan must be specific enough to present.

roles.name: CEO (You)
roles.description: Founder and CEO, visionary but under immense pressure. Must unite the team and convince the board.
roles.private_info: You suspect a board member is in talks with MegaCorp about a fire sale. You have a secret patent application that could buy time, but it's not yet approved.

roles.name: CTO
roles.description: Chief Technology Officer, brilliant engineer who built the original product. Frustrated with the clone.
roles.private_info: You discovered a hidden vulnerability in MegaCorp's version that could be exploited legally. You also have a prototype for a radical new feature, but it's risky.

roles.name: Chief Revenue Officer
roles.description: Sales-driven leader obsessed with numbers. Believes a price war is the only way.
roles.private_info: You have a secret offer from a mid-tier competitor to jump ship, but you're conflicted. You also know that MegaCorp's sales team is poaching your customers.

npcs.name: Board Chair - Margaret
npcs.description: Seasoned investor, calm and calculating. She's seen startups fail before and wants a clear path.
npcs.hidden_agenda: She has a personal grudge against MegaCorp's CEO and wants to see them fail. She'll support a risky but bold move.

npcs.name: Lead Engineer - Priya
npcs.description: Brilliant but overworked, loyal to the CTO. She has ideas for a pivot but is afraid to speak up.
npcs.hidden_agenda: She's been approached by a headhunter for MegaCorp and is weighing the offer. She will leak info if she feels the company is doomed.

npcs.name: MegaCorp Liaison - Victor
npcs.description: Smooth-talking corporate executive who 'accidentally' runs into you at coffee shops. Offers a partnership.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He wants to acquire your company cheaply and dismantle it. His partnership offer is a trap to extract your IP.
